sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّجَوُّلَ فِي الْأَزِقَّةِ الضَّيِّقَةِ لِسُوقِ التَّوَابِلِ الْقَدِيمِ يُعَدُّ تَجْرِبَةً حِسِّيَّةً لَا مَثِيلَ لَهَا.
sentences.translation: Šetnja uskim uličicama stare pijace začina smatra se čulnim iskustvom bez premca.
sentences.translationEn: Walking through the narrow alleys of the old spice market is considered a sensory experience like no other.

sentences.arabic: يَمْتَلِئُ الْهَوَاءُ بِالرَّوَائِحِ الْعَطِرَةِ لِلْكَمُّونِ وَالزَّعْفَرَانِ وَاللَّيْمُونِ الْمُجَفَّفِ، وَهِيَ مَكَوِّنَاتٌ أَسَاسِيَّةٌ فِي الطَّهْيِ.
sentences.translation: Zrak je ispunjen mirisima kima, šafrana i sušenog limuna, koji su osnovni sastojci u kuhanju.
sentences.translationEn: The air is filled with the aromatic scents of cumin, saffron, and dried lime, which are essential ingredients in cooking.

sentences.arabic: يَعْرِضُ التُّجَّارُ بَضَائِعَهُمُ الْمُلَوَّنَةَ فِي أَكْيَاسٍ كَبِيرَةٍ، دَاعِينَ الزَّبَائِنَ لِتَذَوُّقِ الْجَوْدَةِ قَبْلَ الشِّرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Trgovci izlažu svoju šarenu robu u velikim vrećama, pozivajući kupce da probaju kvalitet prije kupovine.
sentences.translationEn: Merchants display their colorful wares in large sacks, inviting customers to taste the quality before purchasing.

sentences.arabic: لَا تُضِيفُ هَذِهِ التَّوَابِلُ النَّكْهَةَ فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ تَحْكِي تَارِيخَ طُرُقِ التِّجَارَةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ الَّتِي رَبَطَتِ الشَّرْقَ بِالْغَرْبِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi začini ne dodaju samo okus, već pričaju historiju drevnih trgovačkih puteva koji su povezivali Istok sa Zapadom.
sentences.translationEn: These spices do not just add flavor; they tell the history of ancient trade routes that connected the East and the West.

sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ إِتْقَانُ التَّوَازُنِ بَيْنَ هَذِهِ الْمَكَوِّنَاتِ فَنًّا حَقِيقِيًّا لَدَى الطُّهَاةِ التَّقْلِيدِيِّينَ.
sentences.translation: Ovladavanje ravnotežom između ovih sastojaka smatra se istinskom umjetnošću kod tradicionalnih kuhara.
sentences.translationEn: Mastering the balance between these ingredients is considered a true art form among traditional chefs.
